scripts.render-build: curl -fsSL https://ollama.com/download/ollama-linux-amd64.tgz -o /tmp/ollama.tgz && tar -C /usr/local -xzf /tmp/ollama.tgz && npm ci --prefix backend && npm ci --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.heroku-postbuild: npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
